case_title: EDEN MONTEYRO VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SF.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JUL-14-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-18-2008 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-18-2008 BY PRO TEM COMMISSIONER: MARK SCHREIBER, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES. PRO TEM COMMISSIONER MADE A DISCLOSURE IN OPEN COURT. THERE WAS NO OBJECTION BY EITHER SIDE TO HAVING HIM HEAR THE CASE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2008 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MONTEYRO, EDEN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTEYRO, EDEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE BY A PREPONDERANCE OF EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT IS RESPONSIBLE FOR INJURIES CLAIMED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
